question: Can a fixed MVRV-bottom gate, equal-weight 5/6/7 top-warning ensemble, SMA200 exit/re-entry and 1.25x cap beat raw 1x buy-and-hold in every complete historical BTC bull leg after conservative costs and financing while reducing bear losses?
decision_use: Determine whether the simplest valuation-plus-trend cycle overlay has a stable enough possibility to justify sequential confirmation; Demo remains excluded.
strongest_claim_if_all_gates_pass: Supports a historically repeatable possibility under three observed rule-level cycles and an actual-funding bridge; it does not prove the current bear has ended or guarantee next-cycle outperformance.
known_exposure: BTC price and MVRV history through 2026H1 have been viewed. A three-vote price overlay failed, and a fixed MVRV replication showed development bottom consistency but unstable top exits. This exact ensemble, SMA200 post-warning logic and 1.25x mapping have not been run. Confirmation is rule-level sequential evidence, not untouched market data.

fixed_rule.mvrv_z: (market cap - market cap / MVRV) / expanding standard deviation of market cap through that day, minimum 365 observations
fixed_rule.bottom_reset: Z crosses from at or above -0.2 to below -0.2
fixed_rule.after_top_warning: the affected sleeve is long only while completed PriceUSD is above completed SMA200

fixed_diagnostics_not_eligible_for_selec: 1.25x continuous holding after the first MVRV bottom reset
development_gate: both complete development bull legs beat buy-and-hold in Base and Stress
full development Base and Stress beat buy-and-hold
development Base maximum drawdown is shallower than buy-and-hold
the complete 2017-peak to 2018-bottom bear leg beats buy-and-hold
both MVRV bottom actions are within plus or minus 90 days and actual peak weights are at least 1.0x
both first post-peak reductions to at most 0.25x occur within 180 days
the candidate is not strictly dominated by any fixed diagnostic on total return, Sharpe and maximum drawdown
180-day block-bootstrap probability of beating buy-and-hold is at least 0.80
confirmation_gate: the 2022-2025 bull leg beats buy-and-hold in Base and Stress
the full confirmation period beats buy-and-hold in Base
confirmation maximum drawdown is shallower than buy-and-hold
the observed post-2025-peak bear segment beats buy-and-hold
the Binance actual-funding bridge beats the spot buy-and-hold proxy in Base and Stress for the 2022-2025 bull leg
stop_rule: Any development failure keeps confirmation and Binance bridge unopened. Diagnostics cannot replace the candidate, the 1.25x cap cannot be changed, and the MVRV or SMA thresholds cannot be retuned from this study.
allowed_fixes: Only data-integrity, parsing, timestamp, deterministic calculation, serialization or documentation fixes that do not change the rule, periods, windows, costs, gates, trial counts or bootstrap settings; record before rerun.
